item.title: Cladribine a Safe ‘Exit Strategy’ for Stopping DMTs for MS
item.description: Results from a new small study suggest people aged 50 and older with MS who want to discontinue disease-modifying therapy can do so with cladribine wi...

item.title: Non-Sterile Wipes Tied to Fatal Infection, Officials Say
item.description: UK health officials have confirmed one death and dozens of infections linked to contaminated non-sterile wipes still found in home first aid kits. Pre...

item.title: FDA Updates Axi-Cel Safety Label for Large B-Cell Lymphoma
item.description: The FDA has removed R/R PCNSL from a Limitations of Use section on the CAR-T product’s label based on positive findings from phase 1 study. Medscape M...

item.title: SMC Rejects Sotatercept For Pulmonary Hypertension
item.description: Scotland’s medicines regulator has rejected sotatercept for PAH, citing insufficient cost-effectiveness evidence despite improved exercise capacity. M...
